creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi there,

On Wed, Apr 3, 2013 at 2:58 PM, Lev Serebryakov <lev@freebsd.org> wrote:
>  I  have same problem with ghc 7.4.2_1, FreeBSD 9-STABLE (r244958) on
>  amd64

Perhaps you may want to install ghc from a binary package first (it is
available via pkgng from the exonetric site) and try to use that for
bootstrapping instead the standard bootstrap tarballs?  The port
supports booting from a locally installed version of GHC (see `make
config`) -- in this case, it could help because the bootstrap tarballs
are of version 7.4.1 and the port itself is of version 7.4.2.  Or you
could get a vanilla binary distribution from the project's site, like
7.6.2 [1].

Let us know if that works so I could update the bootstrap tarballs.


[1] http://www.haskell.org/ghc/download_ghc_7_6_2#freebsd_x86_64
